{{Quote|Deltas! Kill the ones with the knives first!|[[Boss (clone commando)/Legends|Boss]] warns [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]]|<ref name="SWRC" />}}
'''Slaver blades''' were [[Knife/Legends|knives]] manufactured by [[Arakyd Industries/Legends|Arakyd Industries]] used by the [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Species/Legends|species]], often by [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]] when hunting [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]]. Captured slaves were kept from escaping by the combined threat of these blades and the [[Accelerated Charged Particle Array Gun/Legends|ACP array guns]] carried by the Trandoshan guards.<ref name="RCPG" /> In [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],<ref name="date1">''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'' places the [[Mission to the Chaykin Cluster|mission]] on the ''[[Prosecutor]]'' 367 [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which takes place after the start of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. Given that ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' defines a [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Standard year/Legends|standard year]] as 368 days, the ''Prosecutor'' mission must therefore occur in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]].</ref> during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], the Republic [[Acclamator-class transgalactic military assault ship/Legends|assault ship]] ''[[Prosecutor]]'' reappeared in the [[Corbantis system/Legends|Corbantis system]] after disappearing. The [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Delta Squad/Legends|Delta Squad]] were sent to investigate, and there they encountered numerous Trandoshans, several carrying these blades. They later encountered more blade-wielding Trandoshans on their [[Mission to Kashyyyk (Clone Wars)|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]<ref name="SWRC" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].<ref name="date2">''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' places the events on Kashyyyk as 1,088 days ([[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]) after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]], which [[The New Essential Chronology]] places at [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
Slaver blades were first depicted in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Republic Commando]]'', released in [[2005]]. The game's [[Star Wars: Republic Commando: Prima Official Game Guide|official guide book]] then named and described the knives.
